title: AI Location Control: Give Clients FULL Power! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses how clients should have full control over AI operations and geographical deployment decisions. The piece emphasizes that complete control over artificial intelligence infrastructure is critical for proper client governance.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that clients should retain full control over AI operations and over where that infrastructure is geographically deployed. The point matters for enterprise governance: control over the underlying AI infrastructure, including location and deployment decisions, is framed as a prerequisite for clients to govern their systems properly.
